Modify.SQL: INSERT INTO TASK_COUNTS TC (TC.TASK_NUMBER, TC.TASK_DATE, TC.AGE_CATEGORY, TC.TASK_COUNT, TC.ADMIN_COURT_CODE, TC.CREATING_COURT, TC.CREATING_SECTION) VALUES (${TC.TASK_NUMBER}, TO_DATE(${TC.TASK_DATE}, 'DD-MM-RR'), ${TC.AGE_CATEGORY}, ${TC.TASK_COUNT}, ${TC.ADMIN_COURT_CODE}, ${TC.CREATING_COURT}, ${TC.CREATING_SECTION} )
